content:
Binary output issue
* According to the contribution guidelines, binary outputs should be avoided for clashes. That's exactly the issue with your clash, as it allows only two possible answers (either "True" or "False"). Please modify the output requirement to allow for more than two possible answers.

Goal
* Please add "ignoring case" after "same letter".

Output
* Please format "True" and "False" as {{constants}} instead of [[variables]].

Constraints
* Please state the lower and upper bounds of the length of [[text]], and:

[[text]] contains at least 2 words.
Every word in [[text]] starts with a letter.

Thanks.
